Diagnosis: Ascending colon mass suspicious for malignancy

Progressive altered bowel habit with new onset abdominal discomfort; fatigue over 7 weeks. Additional symptoms include tenesmus.

Imaging:
CT TAP on 12/07/2024: low rectum mass with multiple enlarged mesenteric nodes; no liver mets.
